name: AD Servers - Windows Security
notes: One AD server can produce Security, System, DNS Server, Directory Service, and app logs. Use separate rows per input.

name: AD Servers - DNS Server
notes: Clone this row when the same AD hosts also send DNS Analytical or custom DNS text logs.

name: AD Servers - Directory Service
notes: Useful for domain controller and identity monitoring.

name: Linux App Tier - OS Logs
notes: Same Linux hosts can also send application logs. Keep those as separate rows for cleaner ownership and parsing.

name: Linux App Tier - Application Logs
notes: Application logs from the same host group should be separate from OS logs so TA placement and validation stay precise.

name: Network Syslog
notes: Prefer SC4S or HF collection tier.

name: CrowdStrike API
notes: Use dedicated HF or modular input tier.

name: App JSON via HEC
notes: HEC receiver on HF or indexer tier.
